datasets.name: 893879e6
queryLines:
SELECT
  stage,
  sort_order,
  customer_count,
  avg_ltv,
  CONCAT('₹', format_number(avg_ltv, 0)) AS avg_ltv_label
FROM (
  SELECT 'Total Customers' AS stage, 1 AS sort_order,
    COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS customer_count,
    CAST(0 AS DOUBLE) AS avg_ltv
  FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_churn_predictions

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'Critical Risk', 2,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.customer_id),
    ROUND(AVG(s.total_spent), 0)
  FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_churn_predictions c
  JOIN bharatmart.ml.gld_rfm_segments s ON c.customer_id = s.customer_id
  WHERE c.churn_risk_band = 'Critical'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'Urgent Champions', 3,
    COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id),
    ROUND(AVG(total_spent), 0)
  FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_rfm_segments
  WHERE retention_priority = 'Urgent'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'Urgent + Negative Review', 4,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.customer_id),
    ROUND(AVG(s.total_spent), 0)
  FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_rfm_segments s
  WHERE s.retention_priority = 'Urgent'
  AND s.customer_id IN (
    SELECT customer_id
    FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_review_insights
    WHERE sentiment = 'negative'
  )
)
ORDER BY sort_order

datasets.name: 51ed41e4
queryLines:
SELECT 1 AS page_num, 'page1' AS page_id,
  CONCAT(
    CAST((
      SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id)
      FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_review_insights
      WHERE retention_priority = 'Urgent' AND sentiment = 'negative'
    ) AS STRING),
    ' of your most valuable customers are about to leave AND telling you why. Each Urgent customer has spent an average of ₹',
    format_number((
      SELECT ROUND(AVG(total_spent), 0)
      FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_rfm_segments
      WHERE retention_priority = 'Urgent'
    ), 0),
    ' lifetime — ',
    CAST(ROUND((
      SELECT AVG(total_spent) FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_rfm_segments WHERE retention_priority = 'Urgent'
    ) / (
      SELECT AVG(total_spent) FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_rfm_segments WHERE rfm_segment = 'At Risk'
    ), 0) AS BIGINT),
    'x what an average At Risk customer spends. Page 5 has their names.'
  ) AS findings_text

UNION ALL

SELECT 2, 'page2',
  CONCAT(
    CAST(ROUND(
      SUM(CASE WHEN churn_risk_band = 'High' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1
    ) AS STRING),
    '% of the customer base is in the High risk band. But the ',
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN churn_risk_band = 'Critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS STRING),
    ' Critical customers hold the highest lifetime value. Top churn driver: declining spend. Review ratings rank last — dissatisfaction in text does not predict departure.'
  )
FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_churn_predictions

UNION ALL

SELECT 3, 'page3',
  CONCAT(
    CAST((
      SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_rfm_segments WHERE retention_priority = 'Urgent'
    ) AS STRING),
    ' Urgent customers are Champions — average lifetime spend ₹',
    format_number((
      SELECT ROUND(AVG(total_spent), 0)
      FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_rfm_segments WHERE retention_priority = 'Urgent'
    ), 0),
    '. One lost Urgent customer = approximately ',
    CAST(ROUND((
      SELECT AVG(total_spent) FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_rfm_segments WHERE retention_priority = 'Urgent'
    ) / (
      SELECT AVG(total_spent) FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_rfm_segments WHERE rfm_segment = 'At Risk'
    ), 0) AS BIGINT),
    'x the value of one At Risk customer. RFMQ re-ranking improved recommendation quality by 25.5%.'
  )

UNION ALL

SELECT 4, 'page4',
  CONCAT(
    'Negative sentiment is equally distributed across all churn bands at approximately 18%. Reviews alone do not predict churn. ',
    CAST((
      SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_review_insights
      WHERE rating >= 4 AND sentiment = 'negative'
    ) AS STRING),
    ' customers rated 4-5 stars but wrote negative text — hidden dissatisfied. The actionable signal: churn risk PLUS negative sentiment = ',
    CAST((
      SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_review_insights
      WHERE retention_priority = 'Urgent' AND sentiment = 'negative'
    ) AS STRING),
    ' customers. That is the list on Page 5.'
  )

UNION ALL

SELECT 5, 'page5',
  CONCAT(
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT s.customer_id) AS STRING),
    ' customers match current filters. Average lifetime spend: ₹',
    format_number(ROUND(AVG(s.total_spent), 0), 0),
    '. Average churn probability: ',
    CAST(ROUND(AVG(s.churn_probability) * 100, 1) AS STRING),
    '%. Start here.'
  )
FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_rfm_segments s
WHERE s.retention_priority = 'Urgent'
AND s.customer_id IN (
  SELECT customer_id FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_review_insights
  WHERE sentiment = 'negative'

datasets.name: b6be338b
queryLines:
SELECT
  issue,
  COUNT(*) AS mention_count,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_review_insights
    WHERE sentiment = 'negative'
  ), 1) AS pct_of_negative
FROM (
  SELECT EXPLODE(FROM_JSON(issues, 'ARRAY<STRING>')) AS issue
  FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_review_insights
  WHERE sentiment = 'negative'
  AND issues IS NOT NULL
  AND issues != '[]'
  AND issues != ''
)
GROUP BY issue
ORDER BY mention_count DESC
LIMIT 8

datasets.name: a2d9a210
queryLines:
SELECT
  s.customer_id,
  s.rfm_segment,
  s.retention_priority,
  ROUND(s.churn_probability, 3) AS churn_probability,
  c.top_churn_reason,
  ROUND(s.total_spent, 0) AS total_spent,
  ROUND(s.recency_days, 0) AS recency_days,
  rv.sentiment AS latest_sentiment,
  rv.issues AS complaint_issues,
  rec.top_3_products
FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_rfm_segments s
JOIN bharatmart.ml.gld_churn_predictions c
  ON s.customer_id = c.customer_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT customer_id, sentiment, issues
  FROM (
    SELECT customer_id, sentiment, issues,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY review_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_review_insights
  ) WHERE rn = 1
) rv ON s.customer_id = rv.customer_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT customer_id,
    CONCAT_WS(' | ', COLLECT_LIST(CAST(product_id AS STRING))) AS top_3_products
  FROM (
    SELECT customer_id, product_id,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY rfmq_score DESC) AS rn
    FROM bharatmart.ml.gld_rfmq_recommendations
  ) WHERE rn <= 3
  GROUP BY customer_id
) rec ON s.customer_id = rec.customer_id
WHERE s.retention_priority = 'Urgent'
AND rv.sentiment = 'negative'
ORDER BY s.churn_probability DESC, s.total_spent DESC
